text: This was such a safe and loving space created by Tarisha. I felt so much support from her and the whole group and feel such clarity now about how to move forward and become my most feminine and sensual self.
Your cup will be filled if you decide to be brave and vulnerable.
If you are looking for support, compassion, connection to yourself and others then this work is for you.
Tarisha has a big open heart and creates a safe space for you to be vulnerable and do the work. I feel more womanly and in love with my physical and spiritual self after attending her workshop.
Excellent radiant women session with quality practices and it shifts your thought processes almost immediately. Extremely worthwhile and valuable day out.
Do it. This is what you have been yearning for. This is the space you will experience powerful change in a supportive, professional and magical setting. All women need to do this for each other.
Just do it! Cannot explain the experience but is something everyone should do!

I didn't realise how much my body image impacted my life until I felt the release of so much negative emotion during the day. I leave knowing my body is mine and if someone can't love me for whatever I look like then they don't deserve me and it's their loss.
I've walked out with a huge understanding at what I need to do to make all the difference in my life. My blockages are freed and I'm walking out feeling confident in my new future.

Going to a workshop like this opens the doors within yourself to infinite possibilities. It is a great way to feel into your body, become more aware of what kind of woman you want to be and connect with women on the same journey. It is inspirational and will give you lots of insights.
I feel more confident to explore my sexuality.
Beautiful moment of self care and group support.

Tarisha creates such a warm and supportive environment to support everyone that attends to feel safe and nurtured. There are so many powerful activities that feel life-changing. A very rich and full workshop.
I feel more vibrant, sensuous, pleasureful already and I haven't even had sex yet! I'm going home armed with practices that I know will help me to deepen my experience of intimacy and pleasure.
This is a very safe space. Tarisha is an experienced therapist who brings a diverse range of teaching & insights to the group session.
Before I felt disconnected with lack of clarity what I needed to do. Now I've felt the power & love of human connection & it touched my heart. I'm going to bring that into my life.
This is a must for every woman to experience — you are worthy.
A beautiful space, full of openness and honesty. Tarisha is a gift to all.
I am blown away with my experience attending the workshop. I have learnt so much about myself and was able to fully open my heart in a safe and loving circle of amazing women.
I did not know what to expect from this workshop but I have really been impacted by it. I will now go on to further my self help journey that I did not think I needed.
I have loved all my interactions with Tarisha. She holds a very safe space with beautiful practices to help us move through our stuckness and feel what we need to do to grow.
